title: Squirrel Removal in Bellmore, NY | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Bellmore, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving Bellmore homes. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Bellmore homeowners facing squirrel infestations in attics, soffits, and crawl spaces can rely on Best Pest Control NYC for fast, humane removal services. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of Long Island properties, from older colonial homes to modern residential neighborhoods. We provide complete squirrel removal, exclusion, and damage repair services throughout Bellmore and surrounding Nassau County communities.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of wildlife control expertise to Bellmore, combining humane trapping methods with permanent exclusion solutions that prevent future infestations. Our licensed technicians are familiar with Bellmore's residential architecture and provide same-day emergency service with transparent pricing and guaranteed results.
localContext: Bellmore's tree-lined streets and proximity to Newbridge Road Park and Mill Pond create ideal habitats for squirrels seeking entry into homes, particularly in the established neighborhoods near Bellmore LIRR station. The area's mix of vintage Cape Cod and Colonial-style homes often have older rooflines and unscreened vents that squirrels exploit for nesting access.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Bellmore?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Bellmore typically range from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work to seal entry points, and initial cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Bellmore attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the morning and evening, visible damage to roof vents or soffits, chewed wood or wires, droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels entering or exiting your roofline. Bellmore homeowners often notice increased activity during fall and spring when squirrels seek nesting sites.

faqs.question: Are squirrels dangerous to my Bellmore home?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage by chewing electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damaging insulation, gnawing wood structures, and contaminating attics with urine and feces. They can also carry parasites and diseases. Prompt removal prevents costly repairs and protects your family's health and safety.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Bellmore property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Bellmore and can typically begin trapping within 24 hours of your call. Complete removal usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels present. Once removed, we immediately seal all entry points to prevent re-entry and can schedule attic restoration as needed.
